scripts.install:global: bun run --cwd packages/coding-agent build:binary && ln -sfn "$(pwd)/packages/coding-agent/dist/void" "$(npm prefix -g)/bin/void"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/tui build && bun run --cwd packages/ai build && bun run --cwd packages/agent build && bun run --cwd packages/coding-agent build && bun run --cwd packages/mom build && bun run --cwd packages/web-ui build && bun run --cwd packages/pods build
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ai,agent,coding-agent,mom,web-ui,tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,red,white,green,magenta" "bun run --cwd packages/ai dev" "bun run --cwd packages/agent dev" "bun run --cwd packages/coding-agent dev" "bun run --cwd packages/mom dev" "bun run --cwd packages/web-ui dev" "bun run --cwd packages/tui dev"
scripts.dev:tsc: concurrently --names "ai,web-ui" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "bun run --cwd packages/ai dev:tsc" "bun run --cwd packages/web-ui dev:tsc"
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsgo --noEmit && bun run check:browser-smoke && bun run --cwd packages/web-ui check
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && bun scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && bun install
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && bun scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && bun install
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && bun scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && bun install
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build && bun run check
scripts.publish: bun run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: bun run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public --dry-run
